titleStmt.title: SII 23.124: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao

No. 124. (A.R. No. 124 of 1907.) Pāppāṉkuḷam, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Rāmasvāmi temple—on the south and west walls of the maṇḍapa in front Mār. Sundara-Pāṇḍya I: year 20 + 3 (?) 1238-39 A.D.

summary.p: This is an inscription with introduction Pūmaruvīya Tirumaḍandai etc. It is dated in the 20th year and 849th day of the reign of Māṟavarman Sundara Pāṇḍyadēva I (acc. A.D. 1216) who “having taken the Chōḷa country was pleased to perform the anointment of heroes at Muḍikoṇḍa-Chōḷapuram.” It registers an order of the king issued on the representation of (his minister) Maḻavarāyar, granting exemption of taxes on the kārāṇmai lands already belonging to it and on those now presented by the sabhā to the temple of Bhagavati-Viṇṇagar—Āḻvar consecrated at Vēḷārkuṟichchi the north west quarter of Rājarāja-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Muḷḷi-Nāḍu, by Nādan Nambi alias Kumaṇarāyaṉ of Tiruppāṟchōṟṟi. The execution of this order is engraved in another record (No. 124 A) the first line of which is completely damaged but which should evidently begin with the royal title Kōnērinmaikoṇḍāṉ. It is dated in the 20th year and 1158th day of the king's reign i.e. about three months later.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nalañciṟappak koḷārnta ciṉappuliyuṅ koṭuñcilaiyuṅ
perukak karuṅkali kaṭintu ceṅkol naṭappa vorukuṭai niḻali liru nilaṅ kuḷira muvakait tamiḻu muṟaimaiyil viḷaṅka nālvakai vetamu naviṉṟuṭaṉ vaḷara Aivakai veḻviyuñ ceyviṉai yiyaṟṟi vaṟuvakaic camaiyamu maḻakuṭaṉ tikaḻa veḻuvakai
lu miyalvoṭum parava veṇṭicai yaḷavuñ cellak koṅkaṇar kaṅkar kocalar māḷuvar ciṅkaḷar teliṅkar ciṉar kuccarar villa var makatar viraātar vikkalar cempiyar pallavar nutaliyar pāṟtivare llā muṟaiyiṭa maruḷḷeṉ ṟoruvar muṉṉoruvar muṟaimuṟai kaṭava
ntiṟaiñca yilaṅkoḷi maṇimuṭi yintira polaṅkatirār mārpiṉiṟ poliyap paṉmalaṟṟāmarait ticaimukaṉ paṭaitta maṉuneṟi taḻaippa maṇimuṭi cūṭip poṉṉi cūṇāṭṭiṟ puliyāṉai poyakalak kaṉṉi cūṇāṭṭik kayalāṇai kaivaḷara veñciṉa vivuḷiyum veḻamum parap pit taṉceyumuṟantaiyuñ centaḻaṟ koḷu tti
muṉiṉṟu kaviṉiḻaṟṟa
tu pāṇaṉukkuk kuṭut ṭaluñ ciṟappi pāṭakappurucai yāyirat taḷiyiṟ ce vaḷava ṉabhiṣekamaṇṭapa pukaḻvarittu nāṭṭāru nāyan talai kaḻalkoṇṭu nirāḻi muḻutum potuvoḻittu
yappaṭāta varumaṟai tonnantaṇarvāḻ teyvappuliyūṟ tiruvellaiyiṟ pukuntu poṉṉampalam poliya vāṭuvār pūvaiyuṭaṉ maṉṉun tirumeṉi kaṇṭu maṉaṅ kaḷippak kolamalayaṉuṅ kuḷirtuḻāy mālu maṟiyā malaṟcevaṭi vaṇaṅku vāṅku ciṟaiyaṉṉan tuyiloḻiya vaṇ ṭeḻum pūṅkamala vāvicūḻ poṉmālai
ṅkumuyar meruvaik kuṇarntu vaittaṉaiya cotimaṇimaṇṭapattiruntu colaimali paḻaṉac coṇāṭun tāṉiḻanta mālaimuṭiyun tara varukaveṉ ṟaḻaippa vāṉarulakulaiya vāḷakirikkappuṟam poṉvaḷava ṉurumaiyoṭum pukuntu peṟṟa putalvaṉai taṉpereṉṟu muṟkāṭṭapaṟṟi yariyaṇaik kiḻ viḻntu toḻutirappak kāṇoṭi muṉṉiḻanta vemmai Ellāṅ
ṉotakam paṇṇit taṇṭār muṭiyuṭaṉe yiṭṭa pukaliṭan taṉ mār veḷaikkut tiriyaviṭṭapaṭiyeṉṟu mitu piṭipāṭākaveṉap poṅkutirai ñālattup pūpālar toṉviḷaṅkuñ ceṅkayal koṇṭuṉṟun tiru mukamum paṇṭiḻantu coḷapatiyeṉṉu nāmamun toṉṉakaru maḷa ṅki viṭaikuṭuttu viṭṭaruḷi yotta kaṭaṟpāril ventar kiḷaikkuṟṟā
pālaṉeṉṟeṇṇit ta ttivaraikkum vaṭakoṅkaṉ ciṟaimiḷa vā ṇaṅkaḷiṉitirut toṉmālai kaḻittela vaḻaṅkiyaruḷiya maṟ ṟorunāḷ paṟṟūr muḻaṅkumu� poluṅ kiḷai
yanaṉ vantiṭṭa teṇṭaṉukku mi poṅkac cātti pāṇan takka tela ta perut ṭṭutta pāvai karumāl kaḷiṟ varuṅ ka vaṉai kāṭṭi māṭa māṭamaturaiyiṟ tāṉ ponta
kuṇiṟpa vicaivu tiṭṭeṟpak koṇṭivvāṟe ceyyātoḻiyi liya maṉukkiv vevvel viruntarkkuṟu tumpaiyeṉa viṭṭaruḷi muṉ (ṉa) namakku muṭivaḻaṅkuñ cevaṭikkiḻaṉṉam vaḻipaṭuvameṉṉātu piṉ ṉoru nāḷ kāvaleṉātu puṉṉāṭeṉuṅ kaḷiyānaik koḷḷātiṟai maṟutta ceṉṉi viṭu tūṣiyum peṇiya mokkac curuṇṭotuṅki vāciyu
mun terumaṭaṟkaruvik kālāḷum veṭṭuṇṇak kaṇṭu paṭaṅ kaikkoṇṭu velāvalaiyattu viḻuntavaṉ poy mey naṭuṅka vamparuntu mākat taṭal maṇṭalika ruṭal vemparuvam peyum viruntuṇṇa vakkaḷat til yāṉaiyiṉ ve ruppuṅ kaiyuṅ kuṟaittoṅka miṉavaṟkup pākuṭa māmeṉṟu taṉvirakomā kaḻakaṭu taṭavi maḻaitaṭukkuṅ kā
van talakavantattiṉāṭaluṅ kaṭakaiyuṭaṉ pāṭaluṅ kaṇṭu keṭṭuṅ kaḷittiṭa velak karuṅ kūntaveḷḷeyiṟṟuc cevvaṟuppeṟ tulakka pāli pala koṭuveḷ vāḻtti veṉṟu pakaiyiṉ mikaiyoḻiya venta ṟk koṉṟuñ ciṉantaṇiyāka koṟṟa neṭuvāḷaruvic ceṅkuruti niraṟ ṟec ceytu tempulattu vekaivaṭi viccivi
ṭuttup pāṭum paraṇi taṉpārventar keṭpikka vāṭum tirumañcaṉa niril maṇkuḷirāṅkavaṉṟaṉ kaṭṭaṇattiṟ kaṟput tamakkāṇṭu vaḻaṅku murimaikku māmoṅka kaikkoṇṭu mukamaṇippaṭṭa nāṭṭi muṭicūṭi mārpilaṉaittu vaḷavaṉutaṟ teviyeṉap perkuṭutta vañci mutalāṉa meyvaḷaiyar poṅku puṉaṟ kumpa mutalāp pulavar pukaḻum
ḷeṭṭu malaṟkaiyyiṉ mitentik koṭikoṇṭi ñcūḻ muṭikoṇṭa coḻapura maṇṭapattiṟ pattut ticaitoṟuñ cempoṟ yeccam pa nāṭṭa vijaiyāvabhiṣekam paṇṇiyaruḷi vākaik katir velvaṭa ventartam pākamenattaḷai yaṇiya virakka
viḷaṅkiya maṇiyaṇi virasi[ mhāsaṉa] ttu vaḷaṅkeḻu ṭṭakkaṭa leṉa muḻaṅkuṅ vaṭapulaventar maṇippuyam yarilaku kuḻaiyari vaiyar toḻutu niṉṟetta Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu viṟṟirun taruḷiya śrī komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ coṇāṭu koṇṭu muṭikoṇṭa coḻapura
ttu viravabhiṣekam paṇṇiyaruḷiya [śrī] suntarapāṇṭiyadevaṟku yāṇṭu Irupatāvatu nāḷ Eṇṇūṟṟu nāṟpattoṉpatiṉāl maturai Utaiyavaḷanāṭṭu māṭakkuḷak kiḻmaturaikkoyil paḷḷiaṟaikkūṭat tup paḷḷippiṭam maḻavarāyaṉil Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu tiruppāṟ coṟṟi Uṭaiyāṉ nātaṉ nampiyāṉa kumaṇarāyaṉ muḷḷināṭ[ṭu rāja]
rājacatuṟuvetimaṅkalattu vaṭamelpiṭākai veḷārkuṟicciyil Ukantaruḷi vitta pakavativiṇṇakarāḻvār koyil śrīvayiṣṇavarum nampu cey vāṉum ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Ivvāḻvārkkut tirup paṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku Ivvāḻvār kārāṇmai yāṉa Ivvūr kārpacāṉam vi
ḷaiyum nilattuk kaṭamai Iṟukkum kolāl talaivaricai nilaṅkāṇiyum Oṉṟupāti varinilam mākāṇiyum kār Oṉṟupātiyum pacāṉam Oṉṟu kālum nilam Araimāvum māttāl nellu Eṇkalaṉe mukkuṟuṇi varicai nilam Iraṇṭumāviṉ kiḻ mukkāle muṉṟumā mukkāṇiyum māttāl nellu mukkala
ṉe mukkuṟuṇi muṉṉāḻi varicai tulānilam Iraṇṭumāvum kār Eḷḷu viḷaintu pacāṉ Oru pū nilam Orumāvum pacāṉ Oru pū Oṉṟukāl nilam Araikkāṇiyum Āka nilam Eḻumā Araikkāṇik kiḻ mukkālemuṉṟu mā mukkāṇiyum Ivvūr sabhaiyār Ivvāḻvārkkuk kārāṇmai tāṉam paṇṇikkuṭutta puṉcey pula
kkuḷam niyokappaṭi nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nirnilam Araiye Iraṇṭu māvum puṉcey nilam Aṟumāvum nattamum Āka Iṉṉilaṅkaḷ Irupatāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu kārmutal Antarāya mum Uḻutāṉ kuṭiyum Uḷpaṭa tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭampeṟa veṇumeṉṟu maḻavarāyar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil I
vāḻvārkkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭun nivantaṅkaḷukku Iv vāḻvār kārāṇmaiyāṉa Innilam Eḻumāvaraikkāṇikkiḻ muk kāle muṉṟumāmukkāṇiyum Ivvūr capaiyār Ivvāḻvārkkuk kārāṇmai dāṉam paṇṇikkuṭutta pulakkuḷap putukkuḷam niyokappaṭi nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nirnilam Araiye Iraṇṭumāvum puṉcey nilam Ā
ṟumāvum nattamum Āka Innilaṅkaḷ Ivvāṇṭu kārmutal Antarāyamum Uḻutāṉ kuṭiyum Uṭpaṭat tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu variyi lār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyum nam Olaiyum taraccoṉṉom kaik koṇṭu tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷ cellap paṇṇi Ippaṭi cantirātittavaṟ celvatākak kallilum cempi lum ve
ṭṭivittuk koḷka veṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār . Ivai miḻalaik kūṟṟattuk kiḻkūṟṟu veṭciyūrāṉa mummuṭicoḻanallūr veṭṭa ṉūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ civallavaṉāṉa mātavarājaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tirumallināṭṭu taṭaṅkaṇṇi ciṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ coṟaṉ Uyya niṉṟāṭuvāṉāṉa kurukulattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai karuṅkuṭinā
ḻaperurāṉa kiṟtivicālaiyanallūr nakkaṉ Iraṭṭaiyāṉa toṇṭai māṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.124 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
